message:
test(frame): add 48 edge-case tests for Frame, HitGrid, WidgetBudget, WidgetSignal (bd-1kj32)

Cover HitId/HitRegion/HitCell trait impls (Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Eq),
HitGrid clone/get_mut/zero-dims/zero-rect/overwrite/single-cell/full-coverage,
CostEstimateSource variants and traits, WidgetSignal default/new/clone,
WidgetBudget allow_all/allow_only/essential/dedup/empty, Frame construction
variants (from_buffer/with_links/set_links), register_link with/without
registry, widget budget/signal lifecycle, degradation propagation, Draw
trait methods, print_text clipping, zero-dimension panic guards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
